mapper.select: select go.products_id , oi.order_no , go.order_status , oi.order_status_enum_order_status_enum_id_1 , oi.profit_amount , go.op_id , go.user_id , go.deliver_time , go.is_deleted , go.payment_amount , oi.general_orders , go.complete_time , go.actual_amount , go.tel , go.refund_amount , go.order_no as order_no_go , go.refund_type , go.shipping_method , go.quality , oi.total_amount , go.refund_status , go.delivery_status , go.order_type , go.payment_channel , go.remark , oi.order_date , oi.shipping_fee , go.discount_amount , go.payment_order_id , go.tracking_number , oi.commission , go.table_name , go.refund_id , go.shipping_address , oi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , go.create_time , go.cancel_time , go.refund_reason , go.payment_time , go.field_name , oi.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , go.refund_no , oi.order_info_id , go.pay_status , go.recipient , go.shipping_fee as shipping_fee_go , go.shipping_company , go.total_amount as total_amount_go , go.update_time FROM order_info oi left join general_orders go on oi.general_orders = go.id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select go.products_id , oi.order_no , go.order_status , oi.order_status_enum_order_status_enum_id_1 , oi.profit_amount , go.op_id , go.user_id , go.deliver_time , go.is_deleted , go.payment_amount , oi.general_orders , go.complete_time , go.actual_amount , go.tel , go.refund_amount , go.order_no as order_no_go , go.refund_type , go.shipping_method , go.quality , oi.total_amount , go.refund_status , go.delivery_status , go.order_type , go.payment_channel , go.remark , oi.order_date , oi.shipping_fee , go.discount_amount , go.payment_order_id , go.tracking_number , oi.commission , go.table_name , go.refund_id , go.shipping_address , oi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , go.create_time , go.cancel_time , go.refund_reason , go.payment_time , go.field_name , oi.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , go.refund_no , oi.order_info_id , go.pay_status , go.recipient , go.shipping_fee as shipping_fee_go , go.shipping_company , go.total_amount as total_amount_go , go.update_time FROM order_info oi left join general_orders go on oi.general_orders = go.id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select go.products_id , oi.order_no , go.order_status , oi.order_status_enum_order_status_enum_id_1 , oi.profit_amount , go.op_id , go.user_id , go.deliver_time , go.is_deleted , go.payment_amount , oi.general_orders , go.complete_time , go.actual_amount , go.tel , go.refund_amount , go.order_no as order_no_go , go.refund_type , go.shipping_method , go.quality , oi.total_amount , go.refund_status , go.delivery_status , go.order_type , go.payment_channel , go.remark , oi.order_date , oi.shipping_fee , go.discount_amount , go.payment_order_id , go.tracking_number , oi.commission , go.table_name , go.refund_id , go.shipping_address , oi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , go.create_time , go.cancel_time , go.refund_reason , go.payment_time , go.field_name , oi.customer_info_customer_info_id_1 , go.refund_no , oi.order_info_id , go.pay_status , go.recipient , go.shipping_fee as shipping_fee_go , go.shipping_company , go.total_amount as total_amount_go , go.update_time FROM order_info oi left join general_orders go on oi.general_orders = go.id where oi.order_info_id = #{id}
